entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Tanungin mo ako ng isang tanong na tutulong sa akin magsimula."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Huwag munang ibigay ang huling sagot. Itanong sa akin kung ano sa tingin ko ang unang hakbang."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Ipaliwanag kung bakit gumagana ang hakbang na ito."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng hint, hindi ng huling sagot."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng katulad na problema pagkatapos kong malutas ito."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Ito ang sagot ko. Anong maling akala ang ipinapakita nito?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Ito ang pagtatangka ko. Ano ang pinakamaliit na hint na makakatulong?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Gumawa ng katulad na Magsanay ng problema pagkatapos nito."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Ipaliwanag ko muna ang ideya bago ka magpatuloy."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "I-quiz mo ako sa paksang ito at hintayin ang sagot ko."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Anong maling akala ang maaaring magdala sa isang tao sa mali kong sagot?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Isang simple test

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Isang malakas loop sa pag-aaral looks like ito:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang tulong ikaw Matutunan ang faster. Ito Maaari bang also tulong ikaw avoid pag-aaral entirely.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang hint. Gawin hindi Humingi ng ang huling sagot yet.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small hint.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin na hakbang.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: At ang end ng isang study session, magtanong yourself tatlo mga tanong:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Attempt una. Spend tatlo minuto pagsubok nang walang AI.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Avoid ang copy trap

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Bumuo ng isang loop

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: Maaari bang Ako gawin isang new halimbawa?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: Maaari bang Ako Ipaliwanag ang ideya nang walang looking?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Different mga gawain sa pag-aaral kailangan different flows. Gamitin isang Homework Coach para sa mga hint, isang Math Hakbang Coach para sa problema paglutas, isang Socratic tutor para sa deep understanding, mga flashcard para sa recall, at mga quiz para sa pressure-tested pagsasanay.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Gawin Ako alam ano magsanay susunod?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Ipaliwanag ang iyong lumipat. Tell ang AI bakit ikaw chose ang susunod hakbang.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Fix ang maling akala.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Para sa pagsusulat, na means gamit ang Pagsusulat Coach pahusayin isang thesis, structure, o talata habang keeping iyong voice. Para sa code, ito means gamit ang Code Tutor ipaliwanag mga error, magtanong ikaw sa predict output, at tulong ikaw debug rather kaysa pasting isang kumpleto solusyon. Para sa mga exam, ito means gamit ang Paghahanda sa exam Planner magpasya ano magrepaso una at paano subukan yourself.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Mahusay mga prompt para sa honest studying

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Here ay isang slightly mas malakas version ikaw Maaari bang reuse:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Paano sa study kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Kung ang sagot ay yes, AI helped ikaw study. Kung ang sagot ay no, ang susunod lumipat ay hindi mas marami pagbabasa. Ito ay aktibong pagsasanay. Buksan Matutunan ang Anything, Socratic Instruction, o ang AI pag-aaral aklatan ng mga prompt at Gawing ang paksa tungo sa isang gawain ikaw mayroon sa attempt.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Kung ang work ay homework, magsimula sa Homework Coach. Kung ito ay math, Gamitin Math Hakbang Coach at magtanong ito suriin isa hakbang at isang oras. Kung ikaw ay pagsubok maunawaan isang konsepto deeply, Gamitin Socratic Instruction at sagot ang mga tanong bago pagtatanong para sa isang buod.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Kung ikaw paste isang homework tanong at copy ang huling sagot, ikaw may finish ang gawain, pero ikaw mayroon hindi ginawa ang skill. Kung ikaw Humingi ng isang hint, Ipaliwanag ang iyong thinking, Ihambing ang iyong sagot, at subukan isang similar problema, AI becomes isang study partner instead ng isang shortcut.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Magsanay ng isang new version.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Magsanay ng ilipat. Humingi ng isang similar problema kasama ang different numbers, wording, o konteksto.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Gawing ang mahina Tukuyin ang tungo sa isang card sa Flashcard Builder o isang short quiz sa Quiz Ako Sa Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Magtanong ano iyong sagot reveals tungkol sa iyong understanding.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Studying kasama ang AI works pinakamahusay kapag ang tool keeps ikaw sa ang driver's seat.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Na ay isang warning sign. Recognition ay hindi recall. Pagbabasa isang malinaw paliwanag ay hindi ang same bilang pagiging able lumutas isang new problema, magsulat isang talata, o sagot isang tanong sa ilalim ng presyon.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Na loop ay slower kaysa copying, pero ito ay marami faster kaysa staying confused.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Ang copy trap ay subtle. Ito ginagawa hindi always feel like cheating. Sometimes ito feels like pagiging efficient. Ang AI ipinapaliwanag something beautifully, ikaw nod along, at pagkatapos ikaw lumipat sa. Ten minuto later ikaw cannot reproduce ang ideya nang walang sagot sa harap ng ikaw.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Ang difference ay paano ikaw Gamitin ito.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Ang tanong ay hindi kung AI dapat maging part ng studying. Para sa marami mga mag-aaral ito na ay. Ang mas mahusay tanong ay kung ang tool ay pagtulong ikaw Bumuo ng memory, judgment, at confidence, o quietly removing ang eksakto struggle na gumagawa pag-aaral stick.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Ang ilipat hakbang ay ang key. Kung ikaw Maaari bang lamang Lutasin ang eksakto problema ang AI lang walked sa pamamagitan ng, ikaw mayroon learned ang halimbawa. Kung ikaw Maaari bang Lutasin ang isang cousin ng ang problema, ikaw ay pagsisimula matuto ang ideya.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Mga ito ay hindi magic mga salita. Sila ay guardrails. Sila keep ang conversation nakapokus sa thinking instead ng sagot koleksyon.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Mga ito mga prompt keep ikaw aktibo. Sila Gumawa ng ang AI suporta iyong pangangatwiran rather kaysa replace ito.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Subukan mga prompt like mga ito:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Subukan ang problema yourself.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Gamitin AI bilang isang coach para sa understanding, pagsasanay, at feedback instead ng isang shortcut na quietly removes ang pag-aaral.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Gamitin AI para sa ang thinking sa paligid ng ang sagot

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Gamitin mga prompt na Gumawa ng ang AI slow down:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Gamitin ang tama mode

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Gamitin ito rule: pagkatapos anumang AI paliwanag, close ang loop kasama ang output mula sa iyong own mind. Isulat ang ideya likod. Lutasin ang isang fresh version. Gumawa ng isang flashcard. Magturo ito sa isang imaginary younger estudyante. Humingi ng isang quiz. Ang mas marami ang session nagtatanong ikaw makabuo, ang mas kaunti malamang ikaw ay sa fool yourself.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Isulat ang iyong susunod na hakbang.
